# ITPFlutterAppRepo Development Guidelines

Auto-generated from all feature plans. Last updated: 2026-03-13

## Active Technologies
- Dart 3.x with Flutter latest stable channel + flutter_bloc, equatable, dio, retrofit (or dio adapter), json_serializable, drift (SQLite ORM), flutter_secure_storage, firebase_messaging, flutter_local_notifications, google_sign_in, msal_flutter (002-intimpro-mobile)
- Drift (SQLite) for offline cache and pending mutation queue; flutter_secure_storage for access/refresh tokens; backend system-of-record remains SQL Server via InTimeProAPI (002-intimpro-mobile)

- Dart/Flutter 3.19+ + Flutter SDK, Dio (HTTP client), BLoC/Cubit (state management), Sqflite (local storage), Firebase Auth (authentication), flutter_secure_storage (token storage) (001-intimpro-mobile)

## Project Structure

```text
src/
tests/
```
